source_pr.title: *: move tests
source_pr.body: move order by and having tests. Some negative cases can't be migrated, because we use resolver to report error and sometimes get wrong error codes. I will fix resolver in next pr.

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select c1 as a, c1 as b from t order by c1").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1", "2 2")) (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select c1 as a, c1 as b from t order by c1").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1", "2 2")) (executor/executor_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select c1 as a, c1 as b from t order by c1").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1", "2 2")) (executor/executor_test.go)
